topbar.searchPlaceholder: Search clip history, code snippets, secure vaults (Ctrl+K)...

overview.heroTitle: Elevate Your Flow with Knoux AI
overview.heroDescription: Your clipboard history is local-first and augmented by guarded OpenRouter AI routes. Summarize, rewrite, translate, and review copied snippets without exposing provider secrets.
overview.emptyDescription: Copy any text or code on your system to register records.

search.title: Universal Semantic Search Core
search.placeholder: Type content query keywords, source app names, tags, or file extensions...
search.emptyStateDescription: Type inside the search bar above or click any suggested term to scan local clipboard records.
search.noMatchesDescription: Try search expansion terms or clear active filters. Knoux has scanned {count} records in temporary memory.

about.footer: © 2026 Knoux. All rights reserved. Crafted with Electron, React, & Tailwind CSS.
about.creatorDescription: Leading the Knoux visual system and developing premium productivity solutions that align clean aesthetics with honest local-first security boundaries.

circularUI.title: Circular UI Design Language
circularUI.desc: Crafted strictly following the circular medallion design system to match Sadek's approved visual guides.

privacyLocal.title: Privacy local-first sandboxing
privacyLocal.desc: Clipboard records stay local in the renderer unless you explicitly use a guarded AI action. Electron vault encryption is scoped to its IPC bridge.

serverProxy.title: Server-side OpenRouter proxying
serverProxy.desc: Harnesses server-side OpenRouter models to format, analyze, translate, and explain clipboard logs safely.

settings.title: Preferences
settings.heroTitle: Operational controls for AI, storage, security, and deployment readiness.
settings.providerDescription: AI execution is routed through the server endpoint only.
settings.confirmClearHint: Press Clear History again to confirm.
settings.guardedNotice: Cloud sync is disabled until a real sync backend exists.
settings.backupNotice: Provider runtime configuration is excluded from backup exports.

labs.heroTitle: Service Labs converted into a controlled production registry.
labs.heroDescription: This page only shows registry state for active, guarded, and planned services. Planned capabilities stay disabled until real handlers and packaging are verified.

studio.heroDescription: Full-width production workspace for diagnostics, 19 executable developer utilities, real service actions, guarded API testing, build commands, and exportable handoff reports. Heavy utilities use background workers where supported.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Paste your JSON data to format it beautifully.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text.

jwtViewer.title: JWT Viewer
jwtViewer.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens locally.
jwtViewer.signatureNotice: Signature verification is a guarded action and requires a secret key. This tool only decodes the token.
jwtViewer.errorInvalid: Invalid JWT structure. It must have 3 parts separated by dots.
jwtViewer.errorDecode: Failed to decode or parse JWT. Check if it is a valid token.

status.label: AI status
status.guard: Sensitive content detected. AI actions are guarded.

workspace.title: Target Clipboard Text Block
workspace.placeholder: Paste any system logs, emails, creative content, or code segments here...
workspace.guardNotice: Guarded until sensitive content is removed
workspace.emptyDescription: Select any of the AI operator actions on the left side to compile real OpenRouter outputs.

barcode.title: Barcode & QR Code Scanner
barcode.description: Scan codes using your device camera, an image file, or by pasting content.
barcode.pastePlaceholder: Paste a URL to an image or barcode data
barcode.noResult: Start the camera or upload an image to begin scanning.

error.noCamera: Camera not available or permission denied.
error.scanFailed: Could not decode barcode from the source.

scanner.title: Sensitive Data Scanner
scanner.description: Scan text for potential secrets like API keys, private keys, or credit card numbers.
scanner.placeholder: Paste text here to scan for sensitive data...

clips.title: Export Clips
clips.description: Export your selected clipboard items to various formats.
